languages.text: "Ф-фиксирую благодарность Лорду-капитану за спасение жизненных функций... жизни. Да благословит вас Омниссия". {n}Покачиваясь, с пола поднимается измазанный кровью и маслом генетор Ферренц. Неловко цепляясь за пол {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механонедритами{/g}, он разворачивается в сторону и хрипит.{/n} " Н-необходимо срочное отбытие в операционную. Жизнеформа "Мартинакс" нуждается в моей экспертизе".

traits.locale_text: "Ф-фиксирую благодарность Лорду-капитану за спасение жизненных функций... жизни. Да благословит вас Омниссия". {n}Покачиваясь, с пола поднимается измазанный кровью и маслом генетор Ферренц. Неловко цепляясь за пол {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механонедритами{/g}, он разворачивается в сторону и хрипит.{/n} " Н-необходимо срочное отбытие в операционную. Единица Мартинакс нуждается в моей экспертизе".
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n} "I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."
languages.original_text: "Ф-фиксирую благодарность Лорду-капитану за спасение жизненных функций... жизни. Да благословит вас Омниссия". {n}Покачиваясь, с пола поднимается измазанный кровью и маслом генетор Ферренц. Неловко цепляясь за пол {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механонедритами{/g}, он разворачивается в сторону и хрипит.{/n} " Н-необходимо срочное отбытие в операционную. Жизнеформа "Мартинакс" нуждается в моей экспертизе".

traits.locale_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this unit's vital functions... life. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}Swaying, the bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises up. Clinging awkwardly to the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax unit requires my expertise."

Clinging awkwardly to the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax unit requires my expertise."

"I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this unit's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax unit requires my expertise."

languages.text: "Ich d-danke dem Lord Captain hiermit für den Erhalt der Vitalfunktionen dieser Lebensform. Möge der Omnissiah Euch segnen."{n}Der blutige und ölverschmierte Genetor Ferrenz richtet sich unsicher auf. Er klammert sich mit seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} an den Boden und dreht sich keuchend auf eine Seite.{/n} "Ich muss ... sofort in den Operationssaal. Die Lebensform Martinax bedarf meiner Expertise."
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."

traits.locale_text: "Ich d-danke dem Lord Captain hiermit für den Erhalt der Vitalfunktionen dieser Lebensform. Möge der Omnissiah Euch segnen."{n}Der blutige und ölverschmierte Genetor Ferrenz richtet sich unsicher auf. Er klammert sich mit seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} an den Boden und dreht sich keuchend auf eine Seite.{/n}"Ich muss ... sofort in den Operationssaal. Die Lebensform Martinax bedarf meiner Expertise."

languages.text: « J-j'exprime toute ma gratitude envers {mf|le|la} capitaine pour avoir préservé les fonctions vitales de cette entité. Que l'Omnimessie vous bénisse. » {n}Couvert de graisse et de sang, le genetor Ferrenz se redresse maladroitement à l'aide de ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}. Il se tourne sur un côté en haletant.{/n} « Je... je dois me rendre immédiatement au bloc opératoire. L'entité Martinax requiert mon attention. »
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."

traits.locale_text: « J-j'exprime toute ma gratitude envers {mf|le|la} capitaine pour avoir préservé les fonctions vitales de cette entité. Que l'Omnimessie vous bénisse. » {n}Couvert de graisse et de sang, le genetor Ferrenz se redresse maladroitement à l'aide de ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}. Il se tourne sur un côté en haletant.{/n} « Je... je dois me rendre immédiatement au bloc opératoire. L'entité Martinax requiert mon attention. »

languages.text: “我、我在此向舰长大人致以谢意，感谢您挽救了本生命体的生存机能。愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您。”{n}一身鲜血与油污的基因士费伦茨摇晃着站起，用{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}笨拙地撑着甲板。他转过身去，大口喘着粗气。{/n}“我必须……立即前往手术室。马丁纳克斯生命体需要我的专业知识。”
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."

traits.locale_text: “我、我在此向舰长大人致以谢意，感谢您挽救了本生命体的生存机能。愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您。”{n}一身鲜血与油污的基因士费伦茨摇晃着站起，用{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}笨拙地撑着甲板。他转过身去，大口喘着粗气。{/n}“我必须……立即前往手术室。马丁纳克斯生命体需要我的专业知识。”

languages.text: «E... Expreso mi agradecimiento a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por salvar las funciones vitales de esta forma de vida. Que el Omnissiah le bendiga».{n}El genetor Ferrenz, ensangrentado y cubierto de aceite, se levanta tambaleante. Apoyando torpemente sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} en el suelo, se gira a un lado y jadea.{/n} «Necesito... ir al quirófano... inmediatamente. La forma de vida Martinax necesita mis servicios».
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}The bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises unsteadily. Clutching awkwardly at the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax life form requires my expertise."

traits.locale_text: «E... Expreso mi agradecimiento a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por salvar las funciones vitales de esta forma de vida. Que el Omnissiah le bendiga».{n}El genetor Ferrenz, ensangrentado y cubierto de aceite, se levanta tambaleante. Apoyando torpemente sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} en el suelo, se gira a un lado y jadea.{/n} «Necesito... ir al quirófano... inmediatamente. La forma de vida Martinax necesita mis servicios».

languages.text: "この部隊の重要な機能...生命を救ってくれた隊長殿に感謝の意を表します。オムニサイアのご加護がありますように{n}」揺れ動きながら、血と油にまみれたジェネター・フェレンツが立ち上がる。{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}メカデンドライト{/g} 、ぎこちなく床にしがみつきながら{/n}、{n}彼は片側を向いて喘ぐ。{/n}マルティナックス・ユニットには私の専門知識が必要なのです」。
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this unit's vital functions... life. May the Omnissiah bless you."{n}Swaying, the bloody and oil-smeared Genetor Ferrenz rises up. Clinging awkwardly to the floor with his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}, he turns to one side and wheezes.{/n}"I need to go... go to the operating room immediately. The Martinax unit requires my expertise."

languages.text: "Bu yaşam... Formunun hayati fonksiyonlarını kurtardığı için Lord Kaptan'a minnettarlığımı sunarım. Hermesih sizi kutsasın." {n}Kan ve yağa bulanmış Genetör Ferrenz, dengesizce ayağa kalkıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mekadentritleriyle{/g} hantalca yere tutunuyor, bir yana dönüp hırıldıyor.{/n} "Hemen... Hemen ameliyathaneye gitmem gerek. Martinax yaşam formunun uzmanlığıma ihtiyacı var."
languages.original_text: "I h-hereby express gratitude to the Lord Captain for saving this life form's vital functions.
